payload.label: oven
payload.long_description: Front-facing stainless steel oven with a black-glass viewing window and a white kitchen towel draped over the handle; lower storage drawer visible and control area at the top partially shown; the appliance is edge-cropped in the photo and appears photographed from about 0.8 m.
